_doc: Branch ID -> branch name mapping. CANONICAL LOCATION is inside 03_Config/clients_config.json under each client entry as `BranchMapping`. This file is illustrative ONLY -- shows the shape the BranchMapping field should take.
_format_note: Keys MUST be strings (e.g. "1" not 1) because branch numbers from the ODD file may be int OR float (e.g. 1.0). The loader strips trailing .0 in branch_txn/01_branch_data.py. Strip leading zeros if your CU stores branches as 001 -- keys here should match what the ODD column emits.
_what_happens_without_it: Section 10 (Branch Performance) shows numeric branch IDs in chart labels instead of branch names. Add a BranchMapping entry for the client and re-run.
